def test_bitcount_multiple_ones():
    # Test with 127 (binary: 1111111) which has 7 set bits
    # The buggy version uses XOR (n ^= n - 1) which doesn't clear the lowest set bit,
    # causing infinite loop or incorrect behavior
    from source import bitcount
    
    # Using 127 which has multiple 1-bits to expose the bug
    assert bitcount(127) == 7, "bitcount(127) should return 7"
